domain: Greek entasis architectural optical correction (deliberate convex curvature of Doric columns + curved stylobate compensating human-eye perceived concavity/sag)
specific_mechanism: Pre-applied inverse distortion of artifact compensates evaluator perceptual bias; result appears straight despite being curved.
llm_application: PACIO: generator-side pre-applied counter-distortion calibrated to a specific evaluator's known biases (positional, agreeableness, length, formatting). Small calibration head pre-transforms output to invert evaluator distortion. Profile-conditional and automated.
novelty_claim: Judging the Judges (2604.23178), RBD (2505.17100), PRECISE (2601.18777) cover JUDGE-side bias detection. PACIO is GENERATOR-side pre-applied counter-distortion against a fixed evaluator profile. Generator-side counter-distortion not retrieved.
